title: biasolettia glaberrima
intro: Biasolettia glaberrima is a type of flowering plant, also known as the Yellow Trefoil, which belongs to the pea family (Fabaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Biasolettia glaberrima include relief from fever, wounds, and skin issues, as well as potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
